minstrel_01: Melody hums: 'Every road's a verse if you walk it right.'
Melody: 'I once played a troll to sleep. Once.'
Melody: 'Write this down — no, wait, that cloud. LOOK at it.'
Melody: 'The Waterwheel crowd throws bread. Stonepine throws axes.'
hamlet_priest_01: Brother Anselm: 'The Light walks with us. So do my blisters.'
Brother Anselm: 'A prayer before a fight is worth two after.'
Brother Anselm: 'I have bandages. Try not to need them.'
tower_wizard_01: Alzara: 'The tower knows I'm out. It sulks.'
Alzara: 'Don't step there. Ley line. You'd taste purple for a week.'
Alzara: 'Adventure is just fieldwork with worse food.'
_class_bard: Your companion hums a walking tune.
_class_cleric: Your companion murmurs a small blessing.
_class_wizard: Your companion mutters arcana at the horizon.
_class_paladin: Your companion scans the treeline, hand on hilt.
_class_ranger: Your companion reads a bent twig like a letter.
_class_warrior: Your companion cracks their knuckles cheerfully.
